name: Altar
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to (5).

name: Armory
text: Gain a card onto your deck costing up to (4).

name: Band of Misfits
text: Play a nonCommand nonDuration Action card from the Supply that costs less than this, leaving it there.

name: Bandit Camp
text: +1 Card +2 Actions Gain a Spoils.

name: Beggar
text: Gain 3 Coppers to your hand. | When another player plays an Attack card, you may first discard this to gain 2 Silvers, putting one onto your deck.

name: Catacombs
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Choose one: Put them into your hand; or discard them and +3 Cards. | When you trash this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Count
text: Choose one: Discard 2 cards; or put a card from your hand onto your deck; or gain a Copper. Choose one: +(3); or trash your hand; or gain a Duchy.

name: Counterfeit
text: (1) +1 Buy You may play a nonDuration Treasure from your hand twice. Trash it.

name: Cultist
text: +2 Cards Each other player gains a Ruins. You may play a Cultist from your hand. | When you trash this, +3 Cards.

name: Death Cart
text: You may trash this or an Action card from your hand, for +(5). | When you gain this, gain 2 Ruins.

name: Silk Road
text: Worth {1} for every 4 Victory cards you have (round down).

name: Feodum
text: Worth {1} per 3 Silvers you have (round down). | When you trash this, gain 3 Silvers.

name: Forager
text: +1 Action +1 Buy Trash a card from your hand, then +(1) per differently named Treasure in the trash.

name: Fortress
text: +1 Card +2 Actions | When you trash this, put it into your hand.

name: Graverobber
text: Choose one: Gain a card from the trash costing from (3) to (6), onto your deck; or trash an Action card from your hand and gain a card costing up to (3) more than it.

name: Hermit
text: Look through your discard pile. You may trash a nonTreasure from it or from your hand. Gain a card costing up to (3). At the end of your Buy phase this turn, if you didnt gain any cards in it, exchange this for a Madman.

name: Madman
text: +2 Actions Return this to the Madman pile. If you do, +1 Card per card in your hand. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Hunting Grounds
text: +4 Cards | When you trash this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates.

name: Ironmonger
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Either way, if it is an Action card, +1 Action Treasure card, +(1) Victory card, +1 Card

name: Junk Dealer
text: +1 Card +1 Action +(1) Trash a card from your hand.

name: Knights
text: Shuffle the Knights pile before each game with the Knights. Keep it face down except for the top card, which is the only one that can be bought or gained.

name: Dame Anna
text: You may trash up to 2 cards from your hand. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Dame Josephine
text: Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this. | {2}

name: Dame Molly
text: +2 Actions Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Dame Natalie
text: You may gain a card costing up to (3). Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Dame Sylvia
text: +(2) Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Sir Bailey
text: +1 Card +1 Action Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Sir Destry
text: +2 Cards Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Sir Martin
text: +2 Buys Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Sir Michael
text: Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this.

name: Sir Vander
text: Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed this, trash this. | When you trash this, gain a Gold.

name: Marauder
text: Gain a Spoils. Each other player gains a Ruins.

name: Market Square
text: +1 Card +1 Action +1 Buy | When one of your cards is trashed, you may discard this from your hand to gain a Gold.

name: Mystic
text: +1 Action +(2) Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If you named it, put it into your hand.

name: Pillage
text: Trash this. If you did, gain 2 Spoils, and each other player with 5 or more cards in hand reveals their hand and discards a card that you choose.

name: Poor House
text: +(4) Reveal your hand. per Treasure card in your hand. (You cant go below (0).)

name: Procession
text: You may play a nonDuration Action card from your hand twice. Trash it. Gain an Action card costing exactly (1) more than it.

name: Rats
text: +1 Card +1 Action Gain a Rats. Trash a card from your hand other than a Rats (or reveal a hand of all Rats). | When you trash this, +1 Card.

name: Rebuild
text: +1 Action Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Victory card you did not name. Discard the rest, trash the Victory card, and gain a Victory card costing up to (3) more than it.

name: Rogue
text: +(2) If there are any cards in the trash costing from (3) to (6), gain one of them. Otherwise, each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from (3) to (6), and discards the rest.

name: Ruined Library
text: +1 Card

name: Ruined Market
text: +1 Buy

name: Ruined Village
text: +1 Action

name: Survivors
text: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Discard them or put them back in any order.

name: Sage
text: +1 Action Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal one costing (3) or more. Put that card into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Scavenger
text: +(2) You may put your deck into your discard pile. Put a card from your discard pile onto your deck.

name: Hovel
text: When you gain a Victory card, you may trash this from your hand.

name: Necropolis
text: +2 Actions

name: Overgrown Estate
text: {0} | When you trash this, +1 Card.

name: Spoils
text: (3) When you play this, return it to the Spoils pile. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Squire
text: +(1) Choose one: +2 Actions; or +2 Buys; or gain a Silver. | When you trash this, gain an Attack card.

name: Storeroom
text: +1 Buy Discard any number of cards, then draw that many. Then discard any number of cards for +(1) each.

name: Urchin
text: +1 Card +1 Action Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand. | When you play another Attack card with this in play, you may first trash this, to gain a Mercenary.

name: Mercenary
text: You may trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, +2 Cards, +(2), and each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Vagrant
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal the top card of your deck. If its a Curse, Ruins, Shelter, or Victory card, put it into your hand.

name: Wandering Minstrel
text: +1 Card +2 Actions Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the Action cards back in any order and discard the rest.
